summary: Home Assistant can expose camera live view, motion, and doorbell events to Apple Home, but it does not provide HomeKit Secure Video recording. Learn the clean setup paths, accessory-mode rules, and when to keep cameras native to Apple Home, use Scrypted, or keep recording local.

title: Can Home Assistant Use HomeKit Secure Video?
